items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-476 southbound between 1.7 miles north of Exit 13: US 30 - ST DAVIDS/VILLANOVA and 1.1 miles north of Exit 13: US 30 - ST DAVIDS/VILLANOVA. There is a lane restriction.
